Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 234 [unidentified incantation or ritual][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] RA KURi na₄as-ḫar : LUGALu₂-⸢tu₂⸣ [...]

[...] ... of the mountain is ashar-stone : kingship [...]

o 22

[...] x A MA na-šu!(MA-)in-ni a-na KA₂ [...]

[...] ... they are lifting me [...] to the gate [...]

o 33

[...] ⸢TI?⸣ LU TU ana-ku NENNI₂ A NENNI₂ I DI [...]

[...] ... I [...] so-and-so, the son of so-and-so, ... [...]

o 44

[...] ⸢na₄⸣as-ḫar TU₅-ka na₄as-ḫar x [...]

[...] the ashar-stone for your bathing, the ashar-stone ... [...]

o 55

[...] ⸢SAG?⸣-ia₂ ki-i uṣ₄-ṣi-du e-te-⸢qa?⸣ [...]

[...] of my head, when they have made (me) dizzy, proceeding [...]

o 66

[...] ⸢GAL⸣ KU? ša₂ NENNI₂ A ⸢NENNI₂⸣ EN DU₁₁.DU₁₁-ia₅ id-⸢din?⸣ [...]

[...] he gave ... of so-and-so, the son of so-and-so, my adversary, [...]

o 77

[...] ⸢ina⸣ ma-ḫar IB x x x x BI x [...]

[...] in front of ... [...]

o 88

[...] x SIG₄ a?-ḫap? ana ⸢IGI⸣-MEŠ MU NAB [...]

[...] ... I purify the brick, to (his) face ... [...]

o 99

[...] x-MEŠ de-ka-a x [...]

[...] ... raising ... [...]

o 1010

[...] gišGU.ZA-šu₂ ša₂ ⸢NENNI₂?⸣ [...]

[...] of the chair of so-and-so [...]

o 1111

[...] x MA [...]

[...] ... [...]

o 1212

[...] x [...]

[...] ... [...]

(rest of obverse missing)

rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...] x x [...]

[...] ... [...]

r 2'2'

[... EN] ⸢DU₁₁?.DU₁₁?⸣-[ia₅? ...]
